name: Falcon3-7B
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (28 layers, GQA 12/4 heads, SwiGLU)
note: From-scratch 14T-token anchor of Falcon 3 with 32K context; strong math/code for its size.

results.notes: MMLU-PRO 5-shot, from the model card's 'Internal Pipeline Benchmarks' table (distinct from the separate HF Open LLM Leaderboard MMLU-PRO figure of 34.30 on the same card, which uses a different eval harness setting).
Winogrande 0-shot, 'CommonSense' section of the model card's internal pipeline benchmarks table.
MT-Bench average score, 'Instructions Following' row of the model card's internal pipeline benchmarks table.

BFCL AST average, 'Tool Use' row of the model card's internal pipeline benchmarks table. Note: this is 0.5pt above the taxonomy's documented bfcl ceiling (89) but is unambiguously the same Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard metric.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model, 2024-12-17 release, 7B params, 28 layers with GQA 12 query/4 KV heads (confirmed verbatim on model card), 32K context, license 'TII Falcon-LLM License 2.0' confirmed verbatim. All 7 result rows confirmed by directly querying the model card's 'internal pipeline benchmarks' table, which lists the exact sequence '70.5, 40.7, 76.5, 81.4, ..., 29.4, 62.6, 31.9, ..., 52.4, ...' mapping to MMLU 70.5, IFEval 76.5, GSM8K 81.4, MATH 29.4, Arc-Challenge 62.6, GPQA 31.9, BBH 52.4 — matches record exactly (these differ from the separate 'official HF leaderboard' table on the same page, which uses different eval settings, but the record's self-reported values are verifiably present). No changes made.
